examples: And there lies another source of sourness.
Yes, too long and intense an acquaintance can lead to sourness.
Such protestations were lost to the sourness of the national mood.
Babies usually respond negatively to sourness too by wrinkling their noses, blinking, and pursing their lips.
Four basic taste sensations are recognised by our taste buds - bitterness, sourness, sweetness and saltiness.
